results.rendered_html:
avaśa (3. a + vaśa) adj. f. ā.
1〉 keinem fremden Willen unterthan, unabhängig, frei  AV. 6,42,3 . 43,2 . Gegens. saṅgin  ŚĀK. 108 , v. l. ungezügelt: avaśendriyacitta  HIT. I, 16 . lobham  PRAB. 78,5 .
— 2〉 keinen eigenen Willen habend, wider Willen verfahrend, invitus: tairadyate 'vaśaḥ [Page1-0489]  M. 5,33 . kāryate hyavaśaḥ karma sarvaḥ  BHAG. 3,5 . nivṛtto 'smyavaśastadā  R. 2,59,4 . sa majjatyavaśaḥ śoke vātenābhihateva nauḥ 4,6,12 . vimuñcantyavaśā dehaṃ kālasya vaśamāgatāḥ 44,66 . avaśāsmi tadā vīra spṛṣṭā gātreṇa rakṣasā 5,68,38 . Statt avaśī  ŚĀNTIŚ. 1,26  ist wohl avaśo zu lesen.

results.rendered_html:
avaśa a. [nāsti vaśaṃ āyattatvaṃ yasya]
1 Independent, free.
2 Not compliant or docile, disobedient, selfwilled; strī cāvaśā  Pt. 1. 424 ;  Ms. 5. 33. 
3 Not subjected to or swayed; avaśo viṣayāṇāṃ  K. 45 ; uncontrolled, unrestrained; ˚iṃdriyacittānāṃ  H. 1. 18 ; 2. 182 ;  Dk. 34 ; madhurairavaśāni laṃbhayan vaśaṃ  Ki. 2. 55  wild.
4 Not master of oneself, subject to the senses; kamaparamavaśaṃ na viprakuryuḥ  Ku. 6. 95. 
5 Not having one's own will, dependent, helpless, powerless; sakalamavaśaṃ sīdati jagat  H. 2. 77 ; kāryate hyavaśaḥ  Bg. 3. 5 ;  K. 174 ;  Pt. 1. 335 ;  U. 3 ; kathamavaśo hyayaśoviṣaṃ pibāmi  Mk. 10. 13 ; vimuṃcaṃtyavaśā dehaṃ kālasya vaśamāgatāḥ  Rām. ;  Mu. 1. 12. 
6 Necessary, certain; kimasya bhavato yathā suhṛda eva nāśo'vaśaḥ  Mu. 6. 
Comp.
— iṃdriyacitta a. whose mind and senses are not held in subjection.
